section.heading: Purposes
section.chapeau: The purposes of this chapter are—

paragraph.content: to minimize risks to excavators; and
to prevent disruption of vital public services,

section.continuation: by reducing the incidence of damage to underground facilities during excavation through the voluntary adoption and efficient implementation by all States of State one-call notification programs that meet the minimum standards set forth under section 6103.
section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 105–178, title VII, § 7302(a), June 9, 1998, 112 Stat. 478.)

note.heading: Transfer of Functions
note.p: For transfer of duties, powers, and authority of Research and Special Programs Administration under this chapter to the Administrator of the Pipeline and Hazardous Materials Safety Administration, see section 2(b) of Pub. L. 108–426, set out as a note under section 108 of this title.

note.heading: Congressional Findings
